title: 7.2m (24ft) White Shiny Christmas Bead Chain Metallic Xmas Beaded Garland Artificial Pearls Tinsel For Christmas Tree Hanging Decorations DIY Art & Crafts Jeweller
features: 🎄🎅🏿 [CHRISTMAS BEAD GARLANDS]: White beaded string is a lovely addition to a Christmas tree, twining around the tree to give it a festive and shiny appearance. The beaded chain's metallic look and delicate motifs match nicely with other Christmas decorations.

🎄🎅🏿 [GARLAND SIZE]: This Christmas bead is 24 feet (7.3 meters) long and each bead measures 8mm. It is long enough to meet your DIY decoration needs. The elegant beads and Christmas colours of this beaded make it a charming addition to your Christmas decorating projects.
🎄🎅🏿 [SHINY FINISH]: Our Christmas bead chain is bright and plated, making it ideal for twining around Christmas trees, wreaths, pine branches, and table centerpieces to add festive ambience.

🎄🎅🏿 [DIY DECORATION]: These glossy bead garlands may be used in a variety of handicraft projects; you can attach them to tablecloths, use them to adorn lamp shades, design your own chandeliers out of strands of glittering beads, or use them for jewellery, decorating, and other uses.

🎄🎅🏿 [WIDELY APPLICABLE]: These Metallic beads are used for Christmas decorations, Christmas wreath decorations, vases, cake stands, chairs, stockings, wedding scene decorations, gift wrapping, outdoor exhibition decorations, clothing and costume decorations, DIY and crafts, etc.
description: Product Description 【 High-Quality Materials 】 This garland is made of ABS imitation beads, exquisite workmanship, looks more realistic. The grinding process is used to make beads more shiny. You can use it to decorate weddings, DIY flower decorations, Christmas or your windows. 【Garland Size】 The total length of the beads string is about 7.3 meters / 24 feet, and the diameter of a single bead is about 8 mm/0.3 inches, which is enough to meet your different needs. 【Widely Applicable】 This beads garland has a wide range of uses. They can be used to decorate greeting cards and scrapbooks, package gifts, decorate jewelry and hair accessories, and even enrich flower arrangements by hanging garlands on bouquets, adding a little brilliance and charm to your handicrafts. 【Easy to Use】 The artificial Beads are fixed by a thread, flexible and light. You can cut it into a suitable length according to your needs. You can easily adjust the length to meet your needs without worrying about waste. You can use them to decorate lampshades, fix on tablecloths, make your own chandeliers, and more. 【Ideal for Wedding Centerpieces】 Bridal bouquet, wedding garland,beaded curation,wedding backdrop ,decorate the bride's dress,DIY bag, decorate your purse, decorate your Lovely toys.
